title: aristida stricta var. condensata
intro: Aristida stricta var. condensata, also known as thick spike grama, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aristida stricta var. condensata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
